themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Right-wing media in the USA, Poland, Italy, Argentina, France, and the UK continue to focus intensely on Donald Trump’s diplomatic moves, policy shifts, and domestic controversies. Coverage spans his China summit, Iran war stance, and administration appointments, reflecting his enduring influence on global right-wing narratives.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Extensive coverage of Trump’s China summit, Iran war stance, and administration appointments like Pete Hegseth and Marco Rubio.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Polish media highlights Trump’s influence on PiS’s foreign policy, including reactions to his China visit and Iran strategy.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian outlets discuss Trump’s impact on Meloni’s government, particularly regarding U.S.-Italy relations and defense policies.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Argentinian media covers Trump’s diplomatic moves, including his China summit and alignment with Milei’s government.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: French right-wing media analyzes Trump’s policies as a reference point for RN’s own political strategies.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: UK media discusses Trump’s influence on Reform UK’s policies, particularly on immigration and trade.

themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing parties in Spain, Italy, Sweden, France, Norway, and Argentina are advancing policies that prioritize citizens over immigrants in access to housing, social services, and public aid. This theme reflects a transnational shift toward nationalist economic and social policies.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox campaigns on 'national priority' policies in Andalusia, demanding preferential access to public services for locals.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian right-wing parties advocate for policies favoring citizens in housing and social services, often targeting immigrants.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: Sweden Democrats propose policies to prioritize Swedish citizens in welfare and housing, excluding immigrants.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN pushes for policies that prioritize French citizens in social benefits and public services.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: Norwegian Progress Party advocates for policies favoring locals in welfare and housing, often targeting immigrants.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Milei’s government proposes policies that prioritize economic deregulation and privatization, often framed as 'national priority'.

themes.title: Corruption scandals rock far-right governments
themes.blurb: Corruption allegations are dominating coverage of far-right governments in Argentina, Hungary, Poland, Spain, and the USA. These scandals involve high-ranking officials and threaten the credibility of ruling parties, sparking internal divisions and public backlash.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Manuel Adorni faces illicit enrichment allegations, while Javier Milei is accused of covering up corruption.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Hungarian media covers scandals involving Viktor Orbán’s government, including misuse of EU funds and cronyism.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Polish media highlights corruption allegations against PiS officials, including Zbigniew Ziobro’s controversial actions.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox faces internal corruption allegations, including misuse of party funds and harassment claims.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump administration officials face corruption allegations, including misuse of IRS funds and ties to Jeffrey Epstein.

themes.title: Far-right parties exploit immigration tensions
themes.blurb: Right-wing parties in Spain, France, Germany, the UK, Norway, and Italy are leveraging immigration as a key electoral issue. Coverage focuses on anti-immigration rhetoric, protests, and policy proposals to curb migration, reflecting a transnational strategy to mobilize voters.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox exploits immigration tensions in Andalusia, framing it as a threat to national identity and security.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN uses anti-immigration rhetoric to mobilize voters, particularly in response to EU migration policies.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD campaigns on anti-immigration policies, targeting asylum seekers and undocumented migrants.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK leverages immigration tensions, advocating for stricter border controls and deportation policies.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: Norwegian Progress Party pushes anti-immigration policies, focusing on welfare restrictions for migrants.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian right-wing parties exploit immigration tensions, particularly in response to EU migration policies.

themes.title: Right-wing leaders face internal party divisions
themes.blurb: Internal divisions within right-wing parties are a recurring theme in Poland, Spain, Italy, the UK, and Hungary. These conflicts often revolve around leadership struggles, policy disagreements, and corruption allegations, threatening party unity and electoral prospects.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: PiS faces internal divisions between factions led by Morawiecki and Kaczyński, with corruption allegations exacerbating tensions.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox experiences internal conflicts over leadership and policy direction, leading to resignations and public disputes.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian right-wing parties face internal divisions over policy priorities, particularly regarding immigration and EU relations.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK grapples with internal divisions over leadership and policy direction, with resignations and public disputes.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Hungarian media highlights divisions within Fidesz over Orbán’s leadership and the rise of the Tisza Party.
